name: Wellspring
descriptionSeed: A tidal city where nobody feels anything privately. Grief is conducted in public halls; joy is conducted in public halls; the architecture is SHAPED for feeling and it amplifies it deliberately. Visitors either weep within a day or flee within a day, and the Threnodists consider both responses entirely healthy and neither of them embarrassing. A waygate opens onto the lower steps, where the singers can hear who has come. Arriving here is loud in a way no other gate is: the city feels you land.
encounterFlavor: Threnodists who will ask you what you are actually feeling and will not accept 'fine'; a public grieving in full flood; someone who has held something in for years and is about to not.
questSeeds: Someone has come to Wellspring specifically to feel something for the first time, and it may kill them
A Syllogist envoy is here and is being slowly, kindly destroyed
worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_feeling_coast bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
